headline: MySejahtera Health Data Governance Remains Unresolved Since 2022
context: The legal status and ownership of health data collected through MySejahtera during COVID-19 remains unclear 4 years later.

cards.big: Health records of 38 million MySejahtera users remain in legal limbo since 2022
cards.sub: Data ownership dispute between KKM and private developer Entomo still unresolved

cards.big: PAC investigation in 2022 found RM70 million paid to Entomo without proper procurement
cards.sub: Contract irregularities complicated data ownership and transfer negotiations

cards.big: Personal Data Protection Act 2010 does not specifically cover government health databases
cards.sub: Legislative gap leaves citizen health records without clear privacy protections

cards.big: EU GDPR mandates data portability and deletion rights for all health data subjects
cards.sub: International standard gives individuals control over their personal health information

cards.big: 38 million people's health data floating in legal limbo is a privacy disaster waiting to happen
Should all MySejahtera data be transferred to government ownership and given PDPA protections
